creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating a grass7 installation on one of our boxes, I run permanently into this weird error while in last stage of updating/installation:

[...]

/usr/bin/strip /usr/ports/databases/grass7/work/stage/usr/local/grass-7.4.4/etc/r.watershed/seg
strip: open /usr/ports/databases/grass7/work/stage/usr/local/grass-7.4.4/etc/r.watershed/seg failed: No such file or directory
